file_insights.changes: Added .auto-claude/specs/ directory to filesystem watcher; modified channel semantics to distinguish plan changes from card changes using bool signal (true=force redraw, false=conditional redraw)
file_insights.scope: Filesystem watching and event-driven display refresh logic
file_insights.impact: Plan changes now trigger immediate redraw even when card stats unchanged; minimal performance overhead from additional directory watch

patterns_discovered.name: Boolean signaling through event channel
patterns_discovered.description: Use single boolean value through channel (true=plan changed/force redraw, false=card changed/conditional redraw) instead of separate event type enum
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduces channel type complexity; clear semantic meaning at receiver end

patterns_discovered.name: Two-tier event filtering
patterns_discovered.description: First filter by event kind (DebouncedEventKind), then filter by path/filename; extracted is_event() helper
patterns_discovered.benefit: Cleaner logic separation; reusable predicate function

patterns_discovered.name: Conditional directory watching
patterns_discovered.description: Only add .auto-claude/specs/ to watch list if directory exists and git root can be found
patterns_discovered.benefit: Graceful degradation in repos without .auto-claude/ structure

patterns_discovered.name: Display vs stats distinction
patterns_discovered.description: Separate concerns: plan changes don't affect card stats but need redraw; card changes only redraw if stats differ
patterns_discovered.benefit: Minimizes unnecessary redraws while ensuring UI stays in sync with plan updates

gotchas_discovered.issue: Plan changes don't affect card statistics but still require redraw
gotchas_discovered.context: Implementation plan updates enriched display but leave prev_stats unchanged
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Added force_redraw flag to bypass stats-changed check when plan changes detected

gotchas_discovered.issue: Must find git root before adding specs directory to watch list
gotchas_discovered.context: Relative path resolution and directory existence checks
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Used acplan::find_git_root() with null-check and exists() before push

gotchas_discovered.issue: Event filtering needed refinement for new specs/ directory
gotchas_discovered.context: Original logic only checked for .bop extension; specs/ contains .json files
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Switched to filename-based check for implementation_plan.json specifically

approach_details.strategy: Extended existing filesystem watcher to track plan changes via separate signaling channel
approach_details.implementation_quality: Clean separation of concerns; backward compatible; well-commented
approach_details.completeness: Fully implemented - both plan watching and redraw logic integrated

recommendations.item: Extract event classification logic into separate function (classify_event) to reduce list_cards_watch cognitive load
Document boolean channel semantics with type alias or newtype wrapper (e.g., enum RedrawKind { ForceRedraw, ConditionalRedraw })
Consider adding tests for plan change detection under test harness
Monitor if other .auto-claude/ files (specs metadata, locks, state) should trigger similar plan reloads
Profile double-watch overhead (card + specs dirs) on large repos; consider coalescing if needed
